messages.content:
Translate
"현실세계로 나온 버튜버 남궁루리 첫 브이로그 - 킨텍스 플레이엑스포 점검하고, 스테이크 먹고, 행주산성 방문"
"Vtuber Namgung Luri's first vlog out in the real world - Checking out KINTEX PlayX4, eating steak, and visiting Hangjusanseong"

Translate
"33인분"
"33 servings"

Translate
"남궁루리:고생했으니까 많이 먹을 거야!"
"辛241:고맙다(한숨)"

Namgung Luri: "Since we worked hard, we're going to eat a lot!"
Sin241: "Thanks (sigh)"

Translate
"まもなく始まるよ! 良い子のみんなは 画面の前に正座で待機!!"
"It's about to start! All the good kids should wait in front of the screen, sitting seiza-style!!"

Translate
"입금 거부하는 Do the 쥐"
"SHOW ME YOUR G!"
"Do the G = 영등한다"

"[The] Mouse that refuses deposits, Do the G"
"SHOW ME YOUR G!"
"Do the G = Pay Respect"

Translate
"앙등"
*The first charter had a "G" in the upper left.

"Angdeung"
*The first letter has a "G" in the upper left.

Translate
"【移動の合間に】見つけてバニ子【求人バニラ】:
"【In Between Travels】Found by Baniko【Vanilla Recruitment】"

Translate
"結局成功は 出来ませんでしたが･･･ 皆さんの応援で･･･ これからも頑張ることが できます"
"In the end, I wasn't able to succeed... But with everyone's support... I can keep doing my best from now on."

Translate
"なので、どうかっ・・・!"
"So, please...!"

Translate
"なので、どうかっ・・・! どうかはっ・・・! "
"So please...! Please...!"

Translate
"【歌ってみた】絶対に読み取られてはいけないQRコード ～高収入求人バニラに乗せて～"
"【Singing Attempt】The QR Code That Should Absolutely Not Be Scanned ~Set to the Tune of High-Income Recruitment Vanilla~"

Translate
"完全オフモード"
"Complete Off Mode"
